title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Pushed prior Layer 5A commits and implemented the first Layer 5B foundation. Added deterministic eligible-input fingerprints, schema 1.0/1.1 source normalization, playbook update, immutable generations, canonical profile/briefing artifacts, successful derivation ledger commits, atomic current index advancement, configured derived-path support, roadmap updates, and tests. Commit d996992 is pushed; 187 tests pass and main matches origin/main.
open_questions: Should doctor distinguish advisory issues from failures so low_confidence_meeting_date does not force exit 1?
What are the true occurrence dates for the nitesh follow-up, wide-orbit orchestration, fable-5 workflow review, and HTV artifacts?
next_actions: Complete aggregation, recurrence, recent-change and contradiction logic; add overrides, failed derivation records, status/doctor freshness, index repair, playbook show, and concise brief.
